title: Todd Blanche, Trump’s Attorney General Pick, Faces Crucial Hurdle After Rocky Hearing
summary: Even a single Republican “no” vote would block Mr. Blanche’s nomination from consideration by the full Senate, which could sink his confirmation.

title: Hegseth Plans to Screen All Troops, Including Women, for Low Testosterone
summary: Pete Hegseth, as defense secretary, has sought to cultivate an image as a manosphere-friendly leader.

title: Clayton Dodges Question on 2020 Election, and Democrats Call Him on It
summary: Jay Clayton’s nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community comes as the White House pushes to use declassified intelligence to show concerns about election security.

title: A Key Senator Says He Is Undecided on Trump’s Attorney General Pick
summary: Also, the World Cup final is set. Here’s the latest at the end of Wednesday.

title: Almost Half of House Democrats Vote to End Aid to Israel
summary: The measure failed, but the level of support among Democrats exposed a stark shift in the party away from backing the Jewish state.

title: U.S. Military Again Blockades Iranian Ports After Collapse of Cease-Fire
summary: President Trump ordered U.S. warships and aircraft to stop vessels going to and from Iran. Enforcing a blockade takes a huge commitment of warships and aircraft.

title: Wildfire Smoke Spreads Across the Northeast as Temperatures Spike
summary: A heat dome is responsible for miserably high temperatures, and it’s also helping to push smoke from wildfires to the east.

title: Flash Flood Emergency Is Issued in Texas After Days of Pounding Rain
summary: Roads became rivers on Wednesday as emergency officials in towns around San Antonio raced to rescue people who were stranded.

title: Video Pushed Local Police to Come Clean. D.H.S. Is Ignoring the Lessons.
summary: The agency has said little about two fatal encounters in the past week. Local police departments have learned to be forthcoming.

title: F.B.I. Searches Houston ICE Shooting Van for Drugs
summary: Federal investigators believe illegal drugs were inside the vehicle, though the immigration agents involved in the encounter do not appear to have known that.

title: Trump Says He’ll Seek to Replace Immigrant Truck Drivers With Veterans
summary: The president has pushed to curtail the commercial licenses of immigrants, including legal residents, whom he has blamed for crashes.

title: New York Times Files Motion to Quash Subpoenas of Its Journalists
summary: The Justice Department is seeking to compel grand jury testimony as part of an investigation into Times reporting on the president’s new Air Force One jet.

title: Our Top Editor on Subpoenas of Times Journalists
summary: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to reporters who wrote about security concerns involving the new Air Force One. Joe Kahn, the executive editor of The New York Times, responds to what he calls a “naked attempt to intimidate” the newspaper.

title: Investigators Seek Information From Government Officials as Part of Air Force One Leak Investigation
summary: After The New York Times reported on security concerns related to the Qatari-donated jet, the F.B.I. sought to speak with several people who flew aboard the plane with President Trump last week and asked for their phones.

title: ‘The Odyssey’ Review: Passion in Every Frame
summary: Few directors close the divide between the art film and the blockbuster like Christopher Nolan.

title: Archaeologists Unearth a 2,400-Year-Old Sanctuary for the Worship of Odysseus
summary: The ruins of a 2,400-year-old complex suggest that, to the Greeks of antiquity, Homer’s protagonist was not just a character in a poem but a figure of genuine devotion.

title: Cyclospora Outbreak: What to Know About Symptoms and Food Safety
summary: The parasite has sickened thousands across the United States. Experts have tips on how to stay safe.

title: Inside Maine Democrats’ Search for a New Senate Nominee After Graham Platner’s Exit
summary: Democratic candidates are hastily building bare-bones campaigns and forgoing traditional outreach like TV ads in a sprint to appeal to party delegates, rather than Maine voters.

title: Here Are the Maine Democrats Running to Replace Graham Platner
summary: To win, they’ll have to convince Democrats at a July 25 convention that they’re the best candidate to take on Senator Susan Collins, a Republican.

title: G.O.P. Appears to Boost Socialist’s Primary Campaign for Wisconsin Governor
summary: Republicans seem to view Francesca Hong as their weakest opponent in a general election. They are spending $2.2 million in an apparent attempt to aid her primary campaign.

title: Trump Endorses Mike Lindell, MyPillow Founder, for Minnesota Governor
summary: He is a close ally of President Trump and has been a leading proponent of the election denial movement, which falsely claims that voting machines are often rigged.

title: He Wanted to Be John Travolta. Instead, He Became ‘Kaves.’
summary: As a child, Michael McLeer wanted to be like John Travolta in “Saturday Night Fever” and escape Brooklyn. A tragedy in the neighborhood changed his mind.

title: Boat That Sank Near Alcatraz Rolled After Wave Struck, Officials Say
summary: Rescuers described survivors trying to stay afloat in the San Francisco Bay. A brother of the boat’s owner died, and the authorities say they will end the search for the missing.

title: How Worried Should You Be About Cyclospora?
summary: We didn’t need an outbreak of a nightmare stomach bug. But here we are.

title: England Lost in the World Cup. They Were Always Going to Lose.
summary: The football team, like Britain itself, is burdened by the dead weight of impossible expectations.

title: New Jersey Couple Aids Meteorite Discovery After it Crashes Through Their Roof
summary: A New Jersey couple helped scientists uncover the makeup of an unusual asteroid after it fell into their bedroom.
